programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Hashtag

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Boys of Sudworth Place
programme.desc: As the team investigates the disappearance of a prominent Boston attorney, secrets of the man's past are revealed.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Fate
programme.desc: The BAU tracks a conflicted killer in Virginia who feels remorseful after committing crimes; Rossi receives a visitor.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Amelia Porter
programme.desc: When the BAU heads to Salt Lake City to look into a triple homicide, their investigation may lead to a fugitive.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Forever People
programme.desc: The investigation into frozen bodies found floating in a body of water in Nevada leads the team to believe the victims were members of a cult; J.J. confronts her trauma over her abduction.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Anonymous
programme.desc: The team searches for a killer who calls the authorities before committing his crimes; as Rossi prepares for a visit with his daughter, he gets news about the death of an old friend.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Rails + Pitons + Pulley + Pipe + Salt
programme.desc: When Mac and the team are unable to prevent sensitive intel from falling into Codex's hands, Mac must scale a vertical cliff using only gear he can cobble together himself to prevent the info's transmission.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Diamond + Quake + Carbon + Comms + Tower
programme.desc: While on a mission to hunt down a Codex lead, Mac and the team discover Murdoc hacked their comms and has recorded them for months.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: C8H7ClO + Nano-Trackers + Resistance + Maldives + Mind Games
programme.desc: Mac and Riley head overseas together to prevent a governmental collapse and inadvertently inhale new, deadly microscopic technology.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Royalty + Marriage + Vivaah Sanskar + Zinc + Henna
programme.desc: Mac, Desi and Russ go undercover during a royal Indian wedding to protect a princess whose policies could put her life in danger; Bozer suspects Riley is up to her old hacking ways.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Barn Find + Engine Oil + La Punzonatura + Lab Rats + Tachometer
programme.desc: Mac and the team delve into the world of Italian car culture to track down a crime boss; Mac must lean on Desi when he discovers that he's losing the ability to control his hands; Mac and Desi move in together.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: H2O + Orthophosphates + Mission City + Corrosion + Origins
programme.desc: Mac and Desi travel with Bozer to his childhood home when his aunt dies in a tragic accident; they soon discover she may have been murdered for trying to expose the city's contaminated water supply.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Abduction + Memory + Time + Fireworks + Dispersal
programme.desc: Mac and Riley go missing and wake up 24 hours later in a cornfield with no memory of how they got there; they must unravel the mystery and find out how to get rid of the nanotrackers in their bodies, no matter the cost.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: The Rising
programme.desc: Special agents for the Department of External Services, Angus "Mac" MacGyver and Jack Dalton, work to recover a missing bioweapon.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: Finder

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Pinocchio in the Planter
programme.desc: The remains of a successful ad man are found in a new community center playground; the members of the team try to communicate more honestly.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Signs in the Silence

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Hole in the Heart
programme.desc: Booth becomes more determined to catch Jacob Brodsky after he takes out another victim.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Change in the Game

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Memories in the Shallow Grave
programme.desc: A woman's remains are found in a paintball field; Booth and Brennan adjust to life as an expectant couple.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Hot Dog in the Competition

programme.sub-title: The Prince in the Plastic

programme.sub-title: The Twist in the Twister

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Crack in the Code

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Prisoner in the Pipe
programme.desc: When the remains of an escaped convict are found in the sewer, the investigation reveals the man died in prison; Brennan gives birth in unconventional circumstances.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Bump in the Road
programme.desc: When an extreme couponer's remains are found on the side of a road, the investigation leads the team to the supermarket where she shopped; Brennan adjusts to being at work and away from her baby; Cam is unhappy with her daughter's choice of suitors.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Don't in the Do
programme.desc: A corpse that has been dyed blue is found in a landfill; when Bones feels uncomfortable in her post-baby body, Booth tries to boost her self-confidence.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Warrior in the Wuss
programme.desc: Booth and Brennan investigate the death of a truck company employee whose body is found in the woods; Hodgins buys new lab equipment; Brennan worries about Parker's return from England.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Family in the Feud
programme.desc: When a corpse is discovered in the woods, the team considers two families involved in a nearly century-long feud; Brennan is apprehensive when her father (Ryan O'Neal) offers to baby-sit for her daughter.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Overdrive
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates when a Marine corporal who is an amateur race car driver is in a fatal crash on the track.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Follow the Money

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Let It Ride
programme.desc: Sebastian goes undercover; Patton practices his old gambling skills; Pride and the team embark on a perilous plan to trap Garcia.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Hell on the High Water

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Return of the King

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Pandora's Box, Part II

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: End of the Line

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans

programme.sub-title: Hewa Ka Lima

programme.desc: A deadly hit-and-run involves a driverless car carrying heroin; Tani and Quinn are stuck with a pair of YouTubers who are brought on a ride-along.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0

programme.desc: Junior and Tani track down the thief who robbed his parents' home; Five-0 investigates the murder of a beloved philanthropist and the theft of his valuable koa tree; Danny moves in with McGarrett.

programme.sub-title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: When Walter finally learns Cabe's secret about the Baghdad mission, the future of the team is threatened; Ralph puts his life in jeopardy to help the team.

programme.sub-title: Postcards From the Edge

programme.sub-title: Satellite of Love

programme.sub-title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: During a blackout in New Orleans, Pride is determined to figure out who murdered a family friend's fiancé.

programme.title: Nine Deaths of the Ninja
programme.desc: A group of drug runners/freedom fighters has kidnapped a busload of tourists in the Philippines and is threatening to kill them all if one of their partners is not released from prison and the government doesn't halt its anti-drug policies. Even with all their training, will they be able to stop the terrorists when they begin killing hostages and turning loose their squads of attack midgets?
